base_url.description: WaiterAid API base URL. Defaults to the public WaiterAid API host.

auth_hash.description: WaiterAid auth hash, sent as the X-Auth-Hash header on every request.

restid.description: WaiterAid restaurant ID, sent as the X-Restaurant-ID header on every request.

start_date.description: Optional start_date query parameter passed through to the reservations endpoint verbatim. Not used as a stateful incremental cursor by legacy.
